character_dossiers.name: Dick
character_dossiers.biography: A young man carrying a Bible, visibly distressed by fears and heat, observed by the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: A member of the group who dismisses Ben Gunn's significance and leads the search for treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A leader of the group using a crutch, driven by greed and hostile toward others.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor mentioned in the context of a prior warning about fever and health.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased individual referenced as a former crewmate, disregarded by the group.
